mapper.select: select id, user_id, listening_id, duration, progress, understood_count, familiar_count, unfamiliar_count, last_position, created_at, updated_at from user_listening_progress where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update user_listening_progress set duration = #{duration}, progress = #{progress}, understood_count = #{understoodCount}, familiar_count = #{familiarCount}, unfamiliar_count = #{unfamiliarCount}, last_position = #{lastPosition}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
